proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { x0 ∩ x1 ⊂ x0 and x0 ∩ x1 ⊂ x1 }[T](s.underlying_set, Set.new[T](p))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0.underlying_set.is_finite }[T](s)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0]) { not FiniteSet.constraint[T0](x0) or exists(k0: FiniteSet[T0]) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](k0) } }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ Set.new[T](p))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool) { FiniteSet.new[T0](x0.underlying_set ∩ Set.new[T0](x1)) = Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](finite_set_filter[T0](x0, x1)) }[T](s, p)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { Option.some[FiniteSet[T0]](x0) != FiniteSet.new[T0](x1) or x0.underlying_set = x1 }[T](finite_set_filter[T](s, p), s.underlying_set ∩ Set.new[T](p))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](finite_set_filter[T](s, p), x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](s, x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[T](p, x)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { x0 ∩ x1 ⊂ x0 and x0 ∩ x1 ⊂ x1 }[T](s.underlying_set, Set.new[T](p))
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0 -> Bool) { x0.underlying_set ∩ Set.new[T0](x1) = finite_set_filter[T0](x0, x1).underlying_set }[T](s, p)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0.underlying_set ⊂ x1.underlying_set = x0 ⊆ x1 }[T](finite_set_filter[T](s, p), s)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[T](p, x)
function(x0: T) { not p(x0) or q(x0) }(x)
function[T0](x0: T0 -> Bool, x1: T0) { x1 ∈ Set.new[T0](x0) = x0(x1) }[T](q, x)

goal: pset.subset(qset) = forall(x0: T) { pset.contains(x0) implies qset.contains(x0) }
proof: function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[T](pset, qset)
let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ pset and not w0 ∈ qset }
function(x0: T) { not x0 ∈ pset or x0 ∈ qset }(w0)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x1 ⊃ x0 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, s.underlying_set)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, s.underlying_set)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x1 ⊃ x0 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, qset)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, qset)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x1 ⊃ x0 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, s.underlying_set ∩ qset)
function[T0](x0: Set[T0], x1: Set[T0]) { forall(x2: T0) { not x2 ∈ x0 or x2 ∈ x1 } = x0 ⊂ x1 }[T](s.underlying_set ∩ pset, s.underlying_set ∩ qset)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: FiniteSet[T0]) { x0.underlying_set ⊂ x1.underlying_set = x0 ⊆ x1 }[T](fp, fq)
let w0: T satisfy { p(w0) and not q(w0) }
function(x0: T) { not p(x0) or q(x0) }(w0)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](s, x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](filtered, x)
let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ s.underlying_set != w0 ∈ filtered.underlying_set }
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](filtered, x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](FiniteSet.empty[T], x)
let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ FiniteSet.empty[T].underlying_set != w0 ∈ filtered.underlying_set }
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](twice, x)
function[T0](x0: FiniteSet[T0], x1: T0) { x1 ∈ x0.underlying_set = x1 ∈ x0 }[T](filtered, x)
let w0: T satisfy { w0 ∈ twice.underlying_set != w0 ∈ filtered.underlying_set }
